content:
- Debugged failing HA e2e stress test timeout (e2e_multi_node_stress_no_quorum_fencing_with_concurrent_sql) using timeline artifact in .ralph/evidence/27-e2e-ha-stress; hang occurred after etcd quorum loss while polling /ha/state.
- Fixed ha_e2e HTTP observation helper to enforce per-step timeout: wrapped CliApiClient.get_ha_state() in tokio::time::timeout and fell back to direct TCP /ha/state on timeout (src/test_harness/ha_e2e/util.rs).
- Fixed make lint failure from test-only ha_e2e module re-exports by gating src/test_harness::ha_e2e behind #[cfg(test)] (src/test_harness/mod.rs).
- Verified gates are 100% green with flake-mitigation env: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 make check; RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 make test; RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 make test-bdd; make lint.
- Updated task 37 acceptance criteria and marked <passing>true</passing>; ran .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next: commit+push completion (include gate evidence in message), then move to next task.
